probe_method: Start long Qwen inference (200-word essay, num_predict=500). Mid-run, issue second concurrent request. Observe whether both succeed, queue, or 503.

probes.response_preview: Hello! How can I help you today?

probes.note: Ratio 0.65 indicates partial overlap — Ollama processes concurrent requests with some degree of parallelism rather than strict serial queuing. Both requests completed successfully.

evidence_summary: Ollama handles concurrent requests gracefully — no 503, no rejection. Both requests complete successfully. Behavior is partially parallel (ratio 0.65), not purely sequential. Server remains stable under concurrent load.
empty_response_note: Both responses returned empty content due to Qwen 3.5 thinking-mode consuming num_predict budget (500 tokens). This is a Qwen-specific issue, not a queuing issue.
